heading: Omitted
label: 78ii Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , transferred the powers, duties and functions of the Federal Trade Commission under subchapter I of chapter 2A of this title to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Pending proceedings before the Federal Trade Commission were continued before the Securities and Exchange Commission.act June 6, 1934, ch. 404, title II, § 21048 Stat. 908
